Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14823 0 0}What brings you to the nurse's office? Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}My, you want another of my supplementary lessons? You are the quintessential student...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}Ah, don't worry, I was just talking to myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, what do you want to review?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14801 0 0}Well then, I'll tell you once again about the procedure for a standard tarot reading.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}For now, let's keep to the simple one-card spread, where you draw and interpret a single card.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It will suffice for learning the basic methods of the tarot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}Now, a quick word on the deck... For the best results, you'll want to use all 78 cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}But for this explanation, we'll limit ourselves to the 22 Major Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The procedure for telling fortunes via the tarot goes like so: shuffle, cut, spread, and read.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}That means mixing them all up, putting them in a pile, lining up the drawn cards, and examining them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}When I say "spread," I refer to how they will be presented. It's a concept I'll come back to several times.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Ah, I nearly forgot about the necessary preparation before handling the cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}Before one begins a tarot reading, one's mind must be calm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Try to simultaneously unify and relax your consciousness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}You must also stay focused on the goal of your reading, to avoid wishful thinking clouding the result.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Place the cards facedown on the table to hide their images...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then the client of the reading will shuffle, or mix, the cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}If you're reading your own fortune, then you perform this step yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The most common method is to spread them on the table, mixing them in a circular motion with your left hand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The left hand is the agent of the subconscious mind, you see. Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}Though if you're clumsy, or have lost a hand, or what have you, you can use either or both hands. It all depends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}When the client is satisfied, make a single pile, and thus complete the shuffling phase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}A "pile" meaning a neat, orderly stack. You remember this, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Split the stack you've made into three piles, each roughly the same height.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Normally the client also performs the cut, but the fortune-teller is free to perform this step as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}Just allow the spirit to move you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It may be your own feelings, and it may be occult inspiration...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Reorganize the three piles in the order of your choosing, and combine them into one pile again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14815 0 0}Once this is complete, the reader should take the pile.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Be very careful during this step. You must preserve the direction the cards originally faced.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}If the client is someone else, turn the pile so the cards face the same direction that they were to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}And now, it's finally time to draw a card. This is the spread phase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're doing a one-card spread, so turn over the top card, and place it on the field to the side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}In some methods, you specify which card from the top... But that's a topic for another time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}The card on the field provides the answer to the client's question.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, at last, the reading phase.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}First, we must understand the card's meaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}What the card represents depends on if it's reversed or not...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}You do remember that much, yes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are a few exceptions, but in general, a reversed card is negative, and has a different meaning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14806 0 0}Once you understand the meaning of the card drawn, apply it to your question...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let inspiration rise to the surface of your mind, and... well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Form a story around it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}Regardless, simply telling the client the card's meaning isn't considered a true reading.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Using the clue derived from the card, the reader must use their inspiration to look into the client's future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's important to converse with the client as well, to assist with your divinations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14807 0 0}Tarot is about both reading the cards and reading people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}As for the meaning of each card, look them up on your own time. Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}And that's all we covered on the basic procedures of tarot readings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}My throat's starting to hurt, so come back later if you want to hear about another subject.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14801 0 0}I'll tell you again about how to use all 78 Major and Minor Arcana, as well as the basic spread.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}To review, the tarot is made of 22 Major Arcana and 56 Minor Arcana...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}For a total of 78 cards. Is that clear?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}Each card has its own inherent meaning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Many are daunted by the full deck, because of the sheer amount of cards... but take heart![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It is difficult to learn all the meanings, but having them all actually makes your reading easier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}The more details one has available, the easier it is to craft a story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}I already explained the Major Arcana, so let me give you an outline of the Minor Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Minor Arcana are divided into four classes, called suits.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}Do you recall when I told you that this is what common playing cards were modeled after?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Wands, Cups, Swords, and Coins correspond to Clubs, Hearts, Spades, and Diamonds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Each suit has 10 numbered cards, ranging from Ace to 10...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}As well as four face cards—King, Queen, Knight, and Page—unlike the three face cards in common decks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Page is sometimes called Prince, though he's essentially a knight in training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The four face cards are called court cards. That term will come up again, so remember it well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}There are 14 types in total, between the pip cards or number cards, and the face or court cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}These 14 types have four cards each, for a total of 56 cards in the Minor Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}And now you know the makeup of the Minor Arcana. As for how to use them in a reading...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}It's actually the same as the Major Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Keep in mind the meaning of each card and the direction it faces, and use your inspiration to create a story.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}In the Minor Arcana, each suit, number, and court type has its own meaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}One of the best ways to memorize these is to imagine them in a 4-by-14 grid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}And now, each of the four suits' meanings, in brief...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wands for planning and growth, Cups for love and sentiment, Swords for trials, and Coins for wealth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}As for the basic meaning of each of the numbered cards...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ace is the beginning, 2 is balance, 3 is growth, 4 is stability, 5 is change, 6 is balance again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}7 is a new start, 8 is success, 9 is attainment, and 10 marks a terminus, or the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}Court cards represent people and their strengths. It could be the client, or other people involved.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Page represents children, and the offering of knowledge. The Knight is youth and boundless energy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Queen represents adult women, while the King represents mature men.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}It's said that to grasp the meaning of the cards, it's important to communicate with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now then, let's move on to the method of using the full Arcana to tell fortunes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The basic procedure is the same... You'll just be using more cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}Even with the full deck of 78, you must first shuffle, then cut, spread, and read.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The type of spread you use affects the procedure more than the number of cards in use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, for a change of subject... I'll explain the various types of spreads.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}First, remember that the spread is chosen according to the nature of the question.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you want an answer to a single question? Or maybe an overview of the general future?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Use the spread that best fits the request you have in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}For example, if you want to tell the client's past, present, and future...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why not use a three-card spread, where you simply lay out three cards?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Adding a card produces the four-card spread, identifying the past, present, nature of the problem, and future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}If you use the seven-card hexagram spread, with a single card placed in the center of a hexagon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can read both the nature of the problem and a countermeasure against it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}There is also a spread called Question and Answer, involving two choices.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}This reading is done by setting two countermeasures against the question.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Finally, the most well-known spread is the classic Celtic Cross.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's suited to telling fortunes with only the Major Arcana, and is used often by both beginners and experts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}Arrange two cards crossing each other in the center, then one more on all four sides of the cross...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then, place a pillar of four cards, known as the Spear of Destiny, next to it to the right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The cross of six cards represents the overall situation, with the four to the right making it concrete.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}Again, this forms the 10-card spread known as the Celtic Cross.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are other spreads, like the Horseshoe, Witch's Diamond, or the Seven Candles of Life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}And also the normal, triangle, and cross spreads.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}I remember telling you there were far too many types of spreads to go into detail on all of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}And that concludes my lecture on the Major and Minor Arcana, plus the basic types of spreads.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}Pluto calls, so you'll have to ask me about the other lectures next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14801 0 0}Since you seem interested in hearing it again, we'll go over advanced tarot readings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Remember, it's about combining other forms of fortune telling with the tarot deck.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The most well-known fusion with tarot is astrology.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14807 0 0}For example, there's the almost self-explanatory Horoscope Spread.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}After shuffling and cutting the full deck of 78...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Spread them in a circle consisting of 12 cards, then place one more in the center.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}The 12 in the outer circle correspond directly to the 12 signs of the zodiac, also known as Houses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Each House shows an answer to a different problem, such as family and work, marriage, friendship, and money.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The card in the center represents your overall fortune.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}This spread has a variety of uses, since you can gain an overall understanding of life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't we review the significator once again, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's used by those more accustomed to reading the tarot, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14815 0 0}Before shuffling, you choose one card that best fits the client's image and place it on the field.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is the significator.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's very effective in heightening the client's inspiration.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}Do you remember the court, or face, cards? The significator is selected from the Minor Arcana face cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}For a high schooler, the Page card would be best. For an adult, the Knight, King, or Queen would do it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}More experienced readers may use one of the Major Arcana, but the court cards are suitable most of the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14804 0 0}Now, back to ways of fusing the tarot with other fortune-telling methods...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}An even more advanced application would be to use it in conjunction with dowsing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}That would be using a pendulum to find what you're looking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14805 0 0}Make a number of piles, with the cards facedown of course, and perform the dowsing ritual on them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}If the client's significator is found in the selected pile, you continue with the reading.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}If not, try again until you do. This is to confirm that your inspiration has been heightened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14806 0 0}Next, some elementary understanding of the Hermetic Qabalah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The spread based on the shape of the Qabalistic tree of life is another well-known method.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a spread where you distribute the cards according to the ten trees of life, or the Sefirot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14816 0 0}However, to actually put this method into practice, one needs a deep understanding of Qabalah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not only do the positions of the cards have meaning, but the lines or paths connecting them do as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}For example, Chokmah, Chesed, and Netzach on the right represent the conscious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}While Binah, Gevurah, and Hod on the left represent the unconscious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}The balance in between them is represented by the paths of Keter, Tiferet, Yesod, and Malkuth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Proximity to Keter at the top reveals the spiritual side, with Malkuth on the bottom showing the bodily side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14807 0 0}I believe that's all we went over... And so ends our review on advanced tarot readings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14814 0 0}I have exciting business to take care of today, so ask me about the other lectures some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}Ah, is that so? Then please scurry on home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't need ditching students in my office. Out you go, shoo![n]{f 1 1}
